 {"id":"franken_numpy-pmnz","title":"numpy.ma.average python wrapper parity","description":"Add fnp_python.ma_average passthrough wrapper around numpy.ma.average(a, axis=None, weights=None, returned=False, *, keepdims=<no value>). Mask-aware weighted average. Include oracle test covering: unweighted MaskedArray ignoring masked positions, weighted with same shape weights, returned=True yielding (avg, sum_of_weights), 2-D axis=0/1, fully-masked rows producing masked output, and plain ndarray matching np.average.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T12:51:29.201964438Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T12:53:23.646613466Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T12:53:23.644721164Z","close_reason":"Completed: numpy.ma.average wrapper atomic landing","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"franken_numpy-pqam","title":"[MEDIUM] fnp-conformance fixtures/PROVENANCE.md missing (45 fixture files, 6 documented)","description":"per /testing-conformance-harnesses skill: 'fixture provenance is non-negotiable'. Every fixture must record how it was generated (tool + version + command + source-commit).

Current state:
- 45 JSON fixture files in crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/*.json
- COVERAGE.md has a 'Fixture Provenance' table with 6 entries documented (ufunc_input_cases, signal_differential_cases, polynomial_differential_cases, dtype_promotion_cases, shape_stride_cases, runtime_policy_cases)
- 39 fixture files undocumented (datetime_*, fft_*, io_*, iter_*, linalg_*, masked_*, rng_*, string_*, ufunc_adversarial_cases, workflow_scenarios_*, etc.)

Gap impact: when fixtures regenerate in 6 months and results change, there is no record of what numpy version / oracle-capture script / git-commit generated them — cannot diagnose whether a result-change is a bug or a new numpy feature.

Required fix: create crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/PROVENANCE.md with one row per fixture:
  - File name
  - Generator (manual / capture_numpy_oracle / dump_expected)
  - NumPy version used
  - Source git ref at generation time
  - Command invocation
  - Last regenerated date

Template from skill:
  | File                           | Generator       | NumPy | Command                          | Last regen |
  |--------------------------------|-----------------|-------|----------------------------------|------------|
  | ufunc_input_cases.json         | capture_numpy_oracle | 2.4.3 | cargo run --bin capture_numpy_oracle | 2026-04-15 |
  | ...                            | ...             | ...   | ...                              | ...        |

Priority rationale: MEDIUM — blocks reliable fixture regeneration workflow but does not affect current tests. Skill says this is 'non-negotiable' for claiming conformance.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-22T18:34:21.666569276Z","created_by":"cc-numpy","updated_at":"2026-04-22T18:34:21.666569276Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","docs","review"]}

 {"id":"franken_numpy-pxq0","title":"Add multi-axis reduce_var_axes and reduce_std_axes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-01T17:44:52.252214962Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T17:47:54.154534430Z","closed_at":"2026-04-01T17:47:54.154170001Z","close_reason":"Added reduce_var_axes and reduce_std_axes for multi-axis variance/std.
